headline: Human Anatomy: Systems, Organs, and Function
description: Human anatomy studies the structure of the body. 11 organ systems — skeletal, muscular, nervous, circulatory, respiratory, digestive, endocrine, urinary, reproductive, lymphatic, integumentary — work in coordinated integration.

citation.name: Gray's Anatomy: The Anatomical Basis of Clinical Practice, 42nd Edition
Guyton and Hall Textbook of Medical Physiology, 14th Edition
